import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card' type MediaCard = { ctaLabel: string description: string imageAlt: string imageSrc: string title: string } const mediaCard: MediaCard = { ctaLabel: 'Open Collection', description: 'A pastel gradient study with softer transitions and a cleaner editorial feel.', imageAlt: 'Abstract pastel composition', imageSrc: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/pastel-motion-field/1200/900', title: 'Pastel Motion Field' } const Card6 = () => { return (
{mediaCard.title} {mediaCard.description}
) } export default Card6
